name: Macon Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Community bank with $640M in assets, seven offices across three Tennessee counties, offering personal savings accounts, online banking, and mortgage services with FDIC insurance.
description_long:
Macon Bank & Trust Company is a regional community bank headquartered in Lafayette, Tennessee, that has established itself as a local financial institution focused on personalized service. The bank operates seven convenient branch locations across three counties in Tennessee and maintains approximately $640 million in total assets, positioning it as a mid-sized regional institution rather than a large national bank.

The bank offers core consumer banking services including savings accounts, online banking platforms, calculators for financial planning, and mortgage lending services. They provide deposit accounts with FDIC insurance protection up to $250,000 per ownership category and advertise flexible savings plans designed for various financial goals such as vacations, college education, and general savings objectives. Their online banking platform enables customers to conduct transactions remotely without visiting physical branch locations, and they offer account switching services to help customers transition from other institutions.

Macon Bank & Trust Company distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community-focused banking and personal service rather than automated or digital-only operations. The bank explicitly identifies itself as a "community bank" committed to staying connected with the communities it serves, suggesting a traditional relationship-based banking model. Their website includes accessibility features (AudioEye enabled) and mortgage lending capabilities indicated by their NMLS license, demonstrating compliance with federal lending standards.

The company maintains modest transparency on its website regarding full service offerings and current rates. While the website was last updated in 2018 according to copyright notices, the bank remains operational with current FDIC membership. The limited online disclosure of specific product details, rates, and terms may require prospective customers to contact the bank directly for comprehensive information. As a regional community bank, their services and convenience may be geographically limited to customers in their three-county service area.
services: Personal savings accounts with flexible savings plans
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with $250,000 coverage per account ownership category
Seven branch locations across three Tennessee counties for local accessibility
$640 million in total assets indicates financial stability and established operations
Online banking platform available for remote account management without branch visits
Community-focused banking model with emphasis on personal service
Mortgage lending services available with federal NMLS licensing (#446921)
Account switching assistance offered to customers transitioning from other banks
Flexible savings account options designed around different financial goals
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to three Tennessee counties only
Website last updated in 2018 with outdated copyright information; may not reflect current offerings
No specific interest rates, fees, or current product terms disclosed on website
Limited online transparency regarding full range of services and eligibility requirements
Regional institution with fewer resources and technology capabilities compared to national banks

contact.address: 609 Red Boiling Springs Rd, Lafayette, TN 37083

best_for: Tennessee residents in the Lafayette and surrounding three-county service area seeking local community banking
Customers switching from other banks who value personal service and relationship banking
Savers with modest account balances who need FDIC-insured products and financial goal planning
Homebuyers in the region seeking mortgage lending from a locally-established lender
diagnosis: Macon Bank & Trust Company is best for Tennessee residents in its three-county service area who prioritize personalized community banking and local relationships over digital innovation or national availability. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this regional bank only serves customers in its specific Tennessee footprint, making it inaccessible for those outside this area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 609 Red Boiling Springs Rd, Lafayette, TN 37083
